name: asmtest
description: Node.js binding for the asm-test assembly unit-testing framework
//: Packaging scaffolding (see docs/packaging.md): `make node-package` stages the prebuilt libasmtest_emu into native/<plat>/ before `npm pack`, and `files` ships it. A real release adds per-platform prebuilds (prebuildify) and a reusable library module.
